title: Minecraft Gravity Simulator
description: The name says it all. All entities will get their own gravitational pull, and pull other entities towards them.
body:
The name says it all. All entities will get their own gravitational pull, and pull other entities towards them.

There are 2 settings for this: Player Gravity, and Entity Gravity.

For Player Gravity, all players get gravity, and pull entities towards them.

For Entity Gravity, all entities get gravity, and pull other entities towards them.

Enjoy!

Video Preview:
[https://youtu.be/IgtMutx17-s](https://youtu.be/IgtMutx17-s)
